web_results.description: Fixed read-only git commands triggering FSEvents file watcher loops on macOS by adding --no-optional-locks flag (anthropics/claude-code#25750) Fixed custom agents and skills not being discovered when running from a git worktree — project-level .claude/agents/ and .claude/skills/ from the main repository are now included (anthropics/claude-code#25816)
